jaxlibxc
  • Index

Index

A | C | D | E | F | G | H | I | J | K | L | M | N | O | P | R | S | T | Z

A

  • available() (in module jaxlibxc._registry)

C

  • components (jaxlibxc._types.MixedDef attribute)
  • compute() (jaxlibxc.functional.Functional method)
  • compute_exc() (in module jaxlibxc._autodiff)
  • compute_fxc_gga() (in module jaxlibxc._autodiff)
  • compute_fxc_lda() (in module jaxlibxc._autodiff)

  • compute_vxc_mgga() (in module jaxlibxc._autodiff)
  • CORRELATION (jaxlibxc._types.Kind attribute)

D

  • default_params (jaxlibxc._types.FunctionalDef attribute)
    • (jaxlibxc._types.MixedDef attribute)

E

  • energy_fn (jaxlibxc._types.FunctionalDef attribute)

  • EXCHANGE_CORRELATION (jaxlibxc._types.Kind attribute)

F

  • f_zeta() (in module jaxlibxc._utils)
  • Family (class in jaxlibxc._types)

  • Functional (class in jaxlibxc.functional)

  • get() (in module jaxlibxc._registry)
